packet_label: ThirdPerson human inputs on 2026-04-19 local time
explicit_request: Reduce human intervention burden by enforcing the ThirdPerson human default-lane regression contract, using valid evidence surfaces, answering direct questions directly, and honoring stop/go gates.

needs.label: Trustworthy default-lane proof
needs.description: When 'regression' is claimed, proof must exercise the repo's human default lane and use valid in-runtime evidence.

needs.label: Hard stop/go semantics
needs.description: STOP/PAUSE and approval gates must be treated as hard execution state; no tools run past the stop without a resume.

needs.label: Direct answers in the requested shape
needs.description: For agree/disagree and yes/no questions, answer first and explicitly before continuing work.

needs.label: Low-friction approval surfaces
needs.description: When asking for plan approval, provide a diff and concrete links so the human can review without reconstructing state.

needs.label: Root-cause debugging discipline
needs.description: Follow first-disagreement tracing to root cause rather than repeated symptom-level iteration.

suffering_signals.notes: OBSERVED: explicit statement that wrong lane/proof wasted time and required course correction.
OBSERVED: profanity/escalated language consistent with acute frustration; not a diagnosis.
OBSERVED: the human frames agent judgment as a major failure demanding a durable fix.

highest_leverage_context_to_fetch.context: Repo-local regression contract and lane definition (ThirdPerson/REGRESSION.md)
highest_leverage_context_to_fetch.why: The packet's core recurring burden is regression proof-lane mismatch.

clarifying_question.reason: The packet provides explicit constraints and repeated interventions; incremental clarification would likely add burden.
